title: Eastern European Arsenal: Unflagged
description: Resource pack that removes flags from gun icons from Eastern European Arsenal addon for Vic's Point Blank
body:
## Resource Pack for Eastern European Arsenal addon: [EEA](https://modrinth.com/datapack/eastern-european-arsenal)

It removes flags from gun icons from Eastern European Arsenal addon for Vic's Point Blank
